race.comment: SUNSHINEINMYPOCKET (7) put away a handy field first-up with the 60kg from a wide gate over this trip at the Gold Coast on May 9. Kept up to the mark with a 791m tick over trial. Gets a better set-up and is just as effective second-up. WORLD ALLIANCE (13) produced a solid set of figures second-up with the big weight when a slashing third over 1100m at Canterbury. Will relish the fast tempo with the 54.5kg. Shapes as the biggest danger along with BUSTLING (2) who comes up to Sydney after returning in Melbourne. Was off a long break so fitter now and back in grade. Has the speed to hold a position from the draw and at his top he would take plenty of pegging back. EYE OF THE FIRE (12) returns. Only a short break and has had a couple of trials so expect him to be forward.
